title: Comments
no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
edit_alert: You can only edit your own comments within 15 minutes of posting.
edited_submit_alert: You are not authorized to edit this comment or the edit time limit has expired.
failed_update: Failed to update comment. Please try again.
admin_delete_permanent_message: This comment will be permanently deleted as an administrator action.
admin_delete_soft_message: This comment will be deleted (admin action) but kept for thread continuity.
user_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this comment permanently?
error_unauthorized: You are not authorized to delete this comment.
error_failed: Failed to delete comment. Please try again.

auth_popup.title: Sign in to reply
auth_popup.message: You need to be signed in to reply to comments.
